reason: No visitor friends, DMs, public visitor wall, global social graph, ranking, or social feed.
VisitorState and relationships are tavern-scoped and must not become public social profiles.
Existing tavern route already has owner-visible feedback and rumor bubble boundary.
Existing rumor surface to keep as ambient signal instead of social feed.
User-facing card should be polished and mobile-safe.
Run build/test and Playwright visual acceptance.
Pure aggregate activity signal model with explicit no-social guardrails.
Tavern-facing activity card showing visits/NPC/rumor/feedback/gameplay without public visitor social UI.
